creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 226152
net-im/py-matrix-synapse: Update to 1.37.1

This updates the net-im/py-matrix-synapse package to 1.37.1, which includes performance fixes for busy rooms, such as the matrix HQ room which recently saw a spam attack triggering high load on participating servers.

Other than that, the 1.37.0 release has removed ACME protocol support, which was never included in our package to begin with, so no extra steps should be necessary when upgrading. I've also synced the py-attrs dependency with upstream requirements.


portlint: "OK" (3 Warnings, none new)
testport: OK (poudriere: 130amd64)
do-test: OK (Ran 1666 tests in 783.141s, PASSED (skips=36, successes=1630))


The resulting package has been running in production for the past day and appears to work fine. :D
